backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing appointment booking system with staff authentication (username/password), appointment CRUD operations, user profiles, access control mixins, and blob storage integration.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transfers userProfiles and appointments data from old actor state to new actor state, dropping staffUserMap and authenticatedStaff fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: staff login with hardcoded credentials, staff-only appointments dashboard, and session management across page reloads.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities for the Vijaya Children's Clinic appointment booking application with staff authentication.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color palette definitions for light and dark modes, including custom CSS variables for UI components and theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vijaya Children's Clinic React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for landing, booking, confirmation, staff appointments, and staff management pages, wrapped in QueryClientProvider with shared layout.
frontend/src/components/AddStaffModal.ts: Dialog modal component for creating new staff accounts with userId, password, and optional email fields, using useCreateStaff mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDateF: Filter component providing preset date ranges (today, week, month) and custom date range picker for filtering appointments, with clear filters functionality.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentSearc: A search input component with icons for searching appointments by patient name, child name, or phone number, including a clear button when text is entered.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentStatu: Displays an appointment status as a colored badge with appropriate styling for pending, confirmed, completed, and cancelled states.
A dropdown select component for changing appointment status between pending, confirmed, completed, and cancelled states.
frontend/src/components/ClinicDetailsSec: Displays clinic information including services offered, contact details (phone, timings, address), and a QR code in a two-column card layout.
frontend/src/components/EditStaffModal.t: A modal dialog for editing staff user accounts, allowing updates to password, email, and activation status with form validation and loading states.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible modal that prompts admin users to enter their name for profile setup on first login.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying clinic information, contact details, services, copyright notice, and a link to caffeine.ai in a three-column responsive layout.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header with clinic logo, navigation menu (Home, Book Appointment, Staff), mobile menu toggle, and logout button for authenticated staff users.
frontend/src/components/StaffLoginForm.t: React component that renders a staff login form with user ID and password fields, password visibility toggle, and error handling. Includes instructions for first-time setup when no staff accounts exist.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating it with the current Internet Identity and initializing access control. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout state using DFINITY's AuthClient. Includes provider component and helper functions for identity management with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for managing appointments and user profiles, including CRUD operations for appointments, status updates, and user profile management. All hooks depend on the actor instance and handle query invalidation appropriately.
frontend/src/hooks/useStaffAuth.ts: Custom hook managing staff authentication with local storage-based session management (24-hour duration). Handles staff login by first ensuring Internet Identity authentication, then validating staff credentials, with session validation on mount and window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useStaffManagement.ts: React Query hooks for CRUD operations on staff users, including fetching all active staff, creating, updating, and deleting staff accounts. Each mutation includes toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining the Vijaya Children's Clinic color palette (cyan, green, blue) for both light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, accent colors and various UI element styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Empty file placeholder for admin dashboard page component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for admin login page component.
frontend/src/pages/BookAppointmentPage.t: Appointment booking form page with patient details input (parent/child info, contact, preferred date/time), time slot selection (7-9 PM), form validation, and submission using createAppointment mutation.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Confirmation page displayed after successful appointment booking, showing next steps, contact information, and navigation buttons to return home or book another appointment.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Main landing page featuring clinic hero section with doctor info, feature cards (scheduling, timings, care, expertise), services list (newborn care, vaccination, etc.), and navigation to booking and staff portal.
frontend/src/pages/StaffAppointmentsPage: Staff portal page for managing appointments with authentication check, appointment list display with filtering (date, search), status updates via dropdown, and session validation with auto-logout on expiry.
frontend/src/pages/StaffManagementPage.t: Admin-only page for managing staff users with Internet Identity authentication, displaying staff list with search functionality, add/edit/delete operations via modals, and role-based access control.
frontend/src/utils/dateFilters.ts: Provides date filtering utilities for appointments including conversion from bigint timestamps, date range calculations (today/week/month/custom), and filtering appointment arrays by date criteria.
frontend/src/utils/searchFilter.ts: Implements text-based search filtering for appointments by parent name, child name, or phone number with case-insensitive matching.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and parameter cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes (including Vijaya brand colors in OKLCH format), container settings, border radius variables, and typography/animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document showing a staff portal with shared authentication, appointments dashboard, and session management features, with several pending authentication-related feature requests.
